name: example-fs-electric-studio
title: Electric Studio
description: Bold, clean split-panel HTML decks: white panel over cobalt #4361ee, brand marks in the corners, a dark accent bar on the panel edge, quote typography as the hero element, all-Manrope (800/400), confident restrained spacing. Fixed 1920x1080 stage scaled uniformly to any viewport, zero dependencies. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides electric-studio (STYLE_PRESETS section 2).

description_i18n.en: Bold, clean split-panel HTML decks: white panel over cobalt #4361ee, brand marks in the corners, a dark accent bar on the panel edge, quote typography as the hero element, all-Manrope (800/400), confident restrained spacing. Fixed 1920x1080 stage scaled uniformly to any viewport, zero dependencies. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides electric-studio (STYLE_PRESETS section 2).
description_i18n.zh-CN: 大胆干净的上下分割面板 HTML 幻灯片：白色面板 × 钴蓝 #4361ee 面板，四角 brand marks，面板接缝处深色 accent bar，引文排印作为主视觉，全 Manrope（800/400），克制自信的留白。固定 1920x1080 舞台等比缩放适配任意视口，零依赖单文件。Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides electric-studio (STYLE_PRESETS section 2)。

query.en: Create an Electric Studio {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, as a {{density}} deck. Output one self-contained single-file HTML deck with zero dependencies (all CSS/JS inline, no build step, no external JS libraries, icons as inline SVG, charts as pure CSS). The Electric Studio theme is LOCKED - start from this plugin's example.html seed and replace content only; never redesign. Hard rules: (1) Fixed 16:9 stage - author every slide on a 1920x1080 canvas inside .deck-viewport > .deck-stage and scale the whole stage uniformly with one transform (factor = min(innerWidth/1920, innerHeight/1080), centered with letterbox); never reflow content per device, no responsive breakpoints inside slides; keep the seed's full viewport-base.css block and the entire SlidePresentation controller script verbatim (keyboard arrows/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End, debounced wheel, touch swipe, #/<index> hash routing, page counter chrome fixed outside the scaled stage). (2) Each page is one <section class="slide"> switched via .active/.visible classes toggling visibility/opacity/pointer-events - never display:none. (3) Locked design tokens, all in :root and nowhere else: --bg-dark:#0a0a0a; --bg-white:#ffffff; --accent-blue:#4361ee; --text-dark:#0a0a0a; --text-light:#ffffff; soft variants --text-dark-soft:rgba(10,10,10,.58), --text-light-soft:rgba(255,255,255,.72); hairlines --line-dark:rgba(10,10,10,.14), --line-light:rgba(255,255,255,.28); --blue-soft:rgba(67,97,238,.10). No other hues - no gradients, no purple, no warm accents. (4) Locked typography: Manrope only (Google Fonts, weights 400/500/800); display type is Manrope 800 with tight negative letter-spacing (-0.025em to -0.035em); body is 400/500; kickers and marks are 800 uppercase with wide tracking. Never substitute another typeface. (5) Locked layout system - every slide is a vertical two-panel split (.split > .panel-white + .edge-bar + .panel-blue): white panel above, cobalt #4361ee panel below, with a 14px dark #0a0a0a accent bar (.edge-bar) on the panel seam; vary only the split ratio per master (50/50 title, shallow-top dividers/closings with the blue panel dominant, deep-top content slides with a blue takeaway strip). Brand marks sit in the four corners of every slide (.mark-tl/.mark-tr/.mark-bl/.mark-br): cobalt chip + wordmark top-left, section label top-right, deck label bottom-left, NN / NN page mark bottom-right; marks over white are dark, marks over blue are light. (6) Quote typography is the hero visual language: at least one quote-hero slide with an oversized cobalt ldquo mark and Manrope 800 statement type around 92px; no photography, no illustrations - type, flat panels, and the cobalt chip are the only decoration; keep spacing confident and restrained. (7) Compose slides from the seed's masters: title (50/50 statement), agenda (numbered rows on blue), section divider (outlined giant number on cobalt), bullets (ticks on white + takeaway strip on blue), big stat (oversized cobalt number), quote hero, comparison (white panel = their way vs blue panel = our way), 2x2 principle grid on cobalt, pure-CSS bar chart (cobalt bars, scaleY entrance), closing (blue dominant statement). (8) Motion: entrances only via .reveal elements staggered with transition-delay (~0.1s steps) when the slide gains .visible; single easing cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); animate only transform and opacity; prefers-reduced-motion support stays. (9) No scrolling, no overflow; split content into more slides instead of shrinking type; low-density speaker-led decks get one idea per slide with 1-3 bullets, high-density reading-first decks get structured grids with max 4-6 cards.
query.zh-CN: 用 Electric Studio（钴蓝工作室）锁定主题为 {{audience}} 创作一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（{{slideCount}}，{{density}}）：零依赖单文件 HTML，固定 1920x1080 舞台等比缩放；每页都是「白上 × 钴蓝 #4361ee 下」的上下分割面板，面板接缝 14px 深色 accent bar，四角 brand marks（钴蓝色块 + 字标 / 章节 / 页码），全 Manrope（display 800 紧排印、正文 400/500），引文排印为主视觉，无照片无插画、仅平面色块与排印装饰。从插件内 example.html 种子出发，保留舞台缩放系统、SlidePresentation 导航脚本与 :root token 原样，只替换内容；禁止引入规格外的颜色和字体。完整硬性规格以英文 prompt 为准。
